title: Yoga & Pranayama
shortDescription: Master the ancient art of yoga for physical, mental, and spiritual well-being.
description: Our comprehensive yoga program covers Hatha Yoga, Ashtanga Yoga, Pranayama, and meditation techniques. Students learn the philosophical foundations alongside physical practice.

title: Meditation & Dhyana
shortDescription: Discover inner peace through ancient meditation techniques and mindfulness practices.
description: Explore various meditation traditions including Vipassana, Transcendental Meditation, and Vedantic contemplation. Learn to cultivate stillness and clarity of mind.

title: Martial Arts
shortDescription: Train in traditional Indian martial arts including Kalaripayattu and self-defense.
description: Learn the ancient Indian martial art of Kalaripayattu along with weapons training, self-defense, and physical conditioning that builds discipline and inner strength.

title: Sanskrit & Vedic Studies
shortDescription: Master the sacred language of Sanskrit and study ancient Vedic scriptures.
description: Comprehensive Sanskrit education from basics to advanced literature. Study Vedas, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita, and classical Sanskrit texts in their original form.

title: Computer Education
shortDescription: Modern technology education balanced with traditional values and ethics.
description: Learn programming, digital literacy, and modern technology skills while maintaining ethical awareness and mindful use of technology.

title: Moral & Traditional Education
shortDescription: Character development through timeless values and ethical principles.
description: Foundation courses in Indian ethics, dharma, and character building. Students learn through stories, discussions, and practical application of moral principles.

title: Personality Development
shortDescription: Build confidence, communication skills, and leadership qualities.
description: Holistic personality development program focusing on public speaking, leadership, emotional intelligence, and interpersonal skills rooted in Indian wisdom.

title: Spiritual Learning
shortDescription: Deep spiritual education in philosophy, rituals, and inner transformation.
description: Advanced spiritual curriculum covering Indian philosophy, ritual practices, temple traditions, and the path to self-realization under guidance of experienced Gurus.
